title: Fix portfolio and event photo image display (Image Not Found)

requirements.summary: Fix portfolio image rendering pipeline to display uploaded images correctly in PortfolioGallery and OrganizerCard lightbox
acceptanceCriteria: An organizer can upload a portfolio image and it appears correctly in the portfolio grid (no 'No Image' placeholder shown when an image exists).
Clicking a portfolio image opens the lightbox and displays the full-size image instead of 'Image Not Found'.
The image conversion logic correctly handles the Uint8Array/blob data returned from the backend actor and produces a valid src string (base64 data URL or blob object URL).
If an image genuinely has no data, the placeholder is shown as expected.

file_operations.description: Update the component to correctly convert portfolio image blob data from the backend into displayable URLs using the shared utility function. Ensure both the grid thumbnails and lightbox dialog render actual images instead of placeholders when image data exists. The ExternalBlob class provides getDirectURL() for streaming/cached access per the blob-storage component usage instructions.

Fix portfolio image rendering in the organizer card component to correctly convert blob data to displayable URLs using the shared utility function. Ensure the lightbox dialog displays full-size images correctly when opened from the card.

requirements.summary: Fix event photo rendering pipeline to display uploaded photos correctly in EventPhotoGallery lightbox
acceptanceCriteria: An organizer can upload an event photo and it appears correctly in the event photo gallery grid.
Clicking an event photo opens the lightbox and displays the full-size image correctly.
The same Uint8Array-to-URL conversion utility used for portfolio images is applied consistently to event photos.
Placeholder is only shown when no image data is present.

file_operations.description: Update the component to correctly convert event photo blob data from the backend into displayable URLs using the shared utility function. Ensure both the grid thumbnails and lightbox dialog render actual images instead of placeholders when image data exists. The ExternalBlob class provides getDirectURL() for streaming/cached access per the blob-storage component usage instructions.

requirements.summary: Create shared image utility function and consolidate usage across all image-displaying components
acceptanceCriteria: A single utility function handles blob/Uint8Array-to-URL conversion.
All image-displaying components import and use this shared utility.
No component independently re-implements its own conversion logic.

file_operations.description: Create a shared utility module that exports a function to convert ExternalBlob instances to displayable URLs using the getDirectURL() method. The blob-storage component provides ExternalBlob with getDirectURL() which returns a streaming, browser-cached HTTP URL that should be used as the src for images. Include helper functions for handling null/undefined blob data gracefully (returning placeholder state) and for proper cleanup of object URLs if needed.
Update the component to import and use the shared image utility function for preview rendering, ensuring consistent blob-to-URL conversion across upload and display flows.
Update the component to import and use the shared image utility function for preview rendering, ensuring consistent blob-to-URL conversion across upload and display flows.
